summary: Iteration 66 - Enhanced Gunny Bags features tested. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - all new form fields present and working. Stock Summary shows Gunny Bags under Raw Material with correct in/out/available in Bags unit. Category filter buttons work correctly. Party Summary search functionality verified.

console_warnings.warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

seed_data_creation: Test gunny bag entries created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Gunny Bags features fully tested. Key features: 1) Gunny Bags form has new fields: Invoice No (gunny-form-invoice), RST No (gunny-form-rst), Truck No (gunny-form-truck), Party Name (gunny-form-party), GST Type (gunny-form-gsttype), GST Percent (gunny-form-gstpercent), Party Advance (gunny-form-advance). 2) GST calculation works for CGST+SGST and IGST. 3) Accounting entries created for purchases (party ledger JAMA for total, NIKASI for advance, cash NIKASI for advance). 4) Stock Summary shows Gunny Bags under Raw Material category with unit 'Bags'. 5) Category filter buttons work (All, Raw Material, Finished, By-Product). 6) Party Summary search filters all 3 sections (Sale Vouchers, Purchase Vouchers, Paddy Purchase). API endpoints tested: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/gunny-bags, GET /api/gunny-bags/summary, GET /api/stock-summary, GET /api/private-trading/party-summary?search=xyz, GET /api/cash-book.

test_results.gunny_bags_accounting_entries_created: PASS - JAMA for total, NIKASI for advance, cash NIKASI
test_results.stock_summary_shows_gunny_bags: PASS - Raw Material category, unit: Bags
test_results.stock_summary_category_filter: PASS - All, Raw Material, Finished, By-Product buttons work
test_results.party_summary_endpoint: PASS - Returns totals and 3 section summaries
test_results.gunny_bags_list_new_fields: PASS - party_name, invoice_no, truck_no, rst_no, gst_type, etc.
test_results.gunny_bags_summary: PASS - new (govt) and old (market) bag counts
test_results.gunny_form_ui_all_fields: PASS - Date, Bag Type, In/Out, Invoice No, RST No, Truck No, Party Name, Qty, Rate, GST Type, GST %, Party Advance, Reference, Notes
test_results.gunny_table_shows_new_columns: PASS - Party, Inv No, Truck, In/Out, Qty, Rate, Total, GST, Advance, Type
